summary: Planned conservative classification for 10 open PR inventory candidates. No shared canonical was selected for this mixed inventory shard. Security-sensitive PRs #88240 and #88249 are routed to central security handling; all other PRs are kept open as independent or related work because merge, fix PR, low-signal closure, and post-merge closeout are disabled or blocked by evidence.

actions.reason: Related to open issue #87889, but not closable or mergeable in this plan shard because proof is still failing and no shared canonical exists.
Standalone contributor PR with useful code and proof; keep open for normal review rather than dedupe cleanup.
Security-boundary and auth-adjacent changes are out of scope for ProjectClownfish cleanup; route this exact PR to central OpenClaw security handling.
Desktop app, dependency graph, credential handling, and security-boundary signals make this PR unsuitable for backlog cleanup automation.
Standalone gateway behavior PR; failing proof blocks merge-style conclusions but does not justify closure.
Related Feishu streaming follow-up to #91941/#88597, but not a duplicate or superseded item in this inventory shard.
Small standalone docs PR with proof supplied; no closure action is allowed or justified by the artifact.
Maintainer-owned active work with unresolved review findings and waiting-on-author status requires maintainer or author judgment, not cleanup classification.
Draft maintainer-owned PR tied to an open Windows updater issue is not a dedupe or closure candidate; maintainer judgment is needed before any close or merge path.
Likely candidate fix for open issue #91860, but in plan mode with merge/post-merge close disabled it should remain open for normal maintainer review.

needs_human: #89739: maintainer-owned active PR has unresolved ClawSweeper findings and waiting-on-author status after a maintainer re-review request.
#88292: draft maintainer-owned PR is tied to open issue #87993 and requires maintainer judgment before any close or merge path.
